stat_only_definition_1: N1 = Np+d(coincidence, proton arm 1 with deuteron forward branch, #theta_{lab}^{p} = 53.4 deg)
stat_only_definition_2: N2 = Np+d(coincidence, proton arm 2 with deuteron backward branch, #theta_{lab}^{p} = 11.2 deg)
stat_only_definition_3: R = N1 / N2; proton and deuteron coincidence gate is used
stat_only_definition_4: Ni = M x Ntarget x Nbeam x #int_{CM overlap} d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 + #sqrt{2}/2 T20 pzz)]
stat_plus_T_definition_1: N1 = Np+d(coincidence, proton arm 1 with deuteron forward branch, #theta_{lab}^{p} = 53.4 deg)
stat_plus_T_definition_2: N2 = Np+d(coincidence, proton arm 2 with deuteron backward branch, #theta_{lab}^{p} = 11.2 deg)
stat_plus_T_definition_3: R = N1 / N2; proton and deuteron coincidence gate is used
stat_plus_T_definition_4: Ni = M x Ntarget x Nbeam x #int_{CM overlap} d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 + #sqrt{2}/2 T20 pzz)]
